findings.description: The source provides a tutorial class reference for users who are unsure how to implement: 'please.change.me.tutorial.ss99ZZ.B99ZZ011Action'. This is a concrete implementation example that an AI assistant could surface to help users. The accompanying guidance ('実装方法が不明な場合は、チュートリアルに含まれている下記クラスを参照してください。') and the class name are both absent from the knowledge file.
